docs.name: Dropdown
docs.description: Animated single and multi select dropdown with search, select all / deselect all, removable chips, per-option icons, color dots, descriptions, disabled options, grouping, and checkbox / radio / check indicators. Fully keyboard accessible.

props.name: options
props.description: Items: { value, label, icon?, color?, description?, group?, disabled? }. Consecutive options sharing a group render as a labelled section.

props.name: value
props.description: Controlled value — string[] in multiple mode, string in single mode. Omit for uncontrolled.

props.name: onChange
props.description: Fires on selection change. Receives string[] when multiple, otherwise the selected string ("" when cleared).

props.name: multiple
props.description: Enable multi-select (checkbox indicators, chips/count, select all).

props.name: searchable
props.description: Show an in-panel search box that filters options by label.

props.name: clearable
props.description: Show a clear (×) button in the trigger when there is a selection.

props.name: showSelectAll
props.description: Multiple mode: show a Select all / Deselect all row with an indeterminate state.

props.name: selectionIndicator
props.description: Per-option marker. Defaults to checkbox in multiple mode, check in single mode.

props.name: chips
props.description: Multiple mode: render selected items as removable chips in the trigger instead of a count.

props.name: maxVisibleChips
props.description: Number of chips shown before collapsing the remainder into "+N".

props.name: placeholder
props.description: Trigger text when nothing is selected; also the listbox accessible name.

props.name: emptyMessage
props.description: Shown when search yields no matches.

props.name: selectAllLabel
props.description: Label for the select-all row (switches to "Deselect all" when all are selected).

props.name: theme
props.description: Theme for default trigger and panel colors.

props.name: className
props.description: Additional classes merged onto the root wrapper.

variants.label: Single select + icons
Multi-select + search
Grouped + radio

docs.overview: Dropdown is a single- and multi-select control in one component. Set `multiple` to switch modes: single shows a check (or radio) on the chosen item; multiple shows checkbox indicators, a count or removable chips in the trigger, and an optional Select all / Deselect all row with an indeterminate state. Options support leading icons or color dots, secondary descriptions, disabled entries, and grouping (consecutive options sharing `group` render under a section header). `searchable` adds an in-panel filter, `clearable` adds a reset button. It is keyboard operable (Arrow keys, Enter/Space to toggle, Home/End, Escape, Tab) with combobox + listbox/option roles, aria-multiselectable, aria-activedescendant, and aria-selected/aria-disabled. The panel animates open with a spring and chips animate in/out; everything collapses to instant under prefers-reduced-motion. Works controlled (via `value`) or uncontrolled (via `defaultValue`).

scenarios.title: Single select with icons and descriptions
scenarios.description: A role picker where each option carries an icon and a helper line, one entry is disabled, and the selection can be cleared.

scenarios.title: Multi-select with search, select all and chips
scenarios.description: Pick many values with a filter box, a Select all / Deselect all toggle, removable chips in the trigger, and color dots per option.

scenarios.title: Grouped options with radio indicators
scenarios.description: Single-choice plan selector where options are grouped into sections and marked with radio buttons.

accessibility.screenReaderNotes: The trigger is a role=combobox with aria-haspopup=listbox, aria-expanded, aria-controls, and aria-activedescendant. The popup is a role=listbox (aria-multiselectable in multiple mode) with role=option children exposing aria-selected and aria-disabled; grouped options use role=group with an accessible name. Keyboard: ArrowUp/ArrowDown move the active option (skipping disabled, wrapping), Enter/Space toggle, Home/End jump to first/last, Escape closes and returns focus to the trigger, Tab closes. Chip remove buttons and the clear button are labelled.
